about.title: About Pure Ihram
about.subtitle: Pure Ihram was founded to make Ihram (Ihraam) affordable (€19 + shipping) and accessible to all. This is not about profit but about earning ajr (reward) in the Akhirah by serving the Muslim community and making the sacred pilgrimage accessible to believers across Europe.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Pure Ihram was born from a simple yet profound realization: too many Muslims across Europe were struggling to find affordable, quality Ihram (Ihraam) cloth for their pilgrimage to the holy cities of Makkah and Madinah.
story.p2: Having witnessed fellow believers paying excessive prices for basic pilgrimage essentials, we made a commitment to provide premium Ihram cloth at an honest, accessible price of just €19.
story.p3: Our mission extends beyond commerce – every sale is made with the sincere intention of earning ajr (reward) in the Akhirah while helping our brothers and sisters fulfill their religious obligations without financial burden.
story.p4: Today, we're proud to serve thousands of pilgrims across Sweden, the Nordic countries, and the European Union, ensuring that distance and cost never become barriers to spiritual fulfillment.

promise.title: Our Promise
promise.text: "We promise to provide every Muslim with access to pure, comfortable Ihram (Ihraam) cloth at a price that honors both quality and affordability. Our commitment is not just to your pilgrimage, but to your spiritual journey and the barakah it brings."
promise.hadith: "The most beloved of people to Allah are those who are most beneficial to the people."

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide every aspect of our business

purity.title: Purity
purity.description: Every Ihram is prepared with the pure intention of earning reward in the Akhirah and serving the Muslim community with sincerity.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: We believe every Muslim should have access to quality Ihram (Ihraam) cloth at €19, regardless of their financial situation.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Building trust through consistent quality, reliable delivery, and transparent pricing across Sweden, Nordics, and Europe.

quality.title: Why Quality Matters
quality.p1: During Hajj and Umrah, pilgrims face intense physical and spiritual demands. Your Ihram should be the least of your concerns – comfortable, breathable, and durable enough to withstand the journey ahead.
quality.p2: We source our fabric from trusted suppliers who understand the sacred nature of these garments. Every piece is inspected, pre-washed, and prepared with the care befitting its holy purpose.

size.question: Is the Ihram suitable for tall/broad men?
size.answer: Yes, our generous size (115cm x 200cm each piece) is suitable for all body types, including tall and broad-shouldered men.

accessories.question: Do you also sell belts or sandals?
accessories.answer: Not yet, but we're working on expanding our pilgrimage essentials collection. Belts and sandals coming soon, In Sha Allah.

bulk.question: Can mosques/travel groups order in bulk?
bulk.answer: Yes! We welcome bulk orders from mosques, travel agencies, and Hajj/Umrah groups. Contact us for special pricing on orders of 20+ sets.

shipping.question: How long does shipping take?
shipping.answer: Sweden: 3-7 business days, Nordic countries: 7-14 business days, EU: 7-14 business days. Free shipping on orders over 50€.

included.question: What's included in the Ihram set?
included.answer: Two unstitched white pieces: Izaar (lower garment) and Ridaa (upper garment).

returns.question: Can I return or exchange?
returns.answer: Yes, we offer returns within 14 days if unused and in original packaging.

donation.seoDescription: Support Pure Ihram's mission to serve pilgrims, support masjids, and provide affordable Ihram through voluntary donations.

hero.title: Support Our Mission (Amanah)
hero.subtitle: We keep Ihrams affordable, support mosques, and fund needy projects globally. This is people's money, and we are answerable to Allah (سبحانه وتعالى).

why.affordableDesc: Donations help us keep prices accessible and reduce barriers for worship.
why.masjidsDesc: We provide Ihrams to mosques. Mosques can sell them and keep the money for mosque needs and development.
why.educationDesc: Donations support verified projects where people are suffering across the globe.

donation.transparency: Your donation supports our mission and may also cover essential delivery costs like shipping/packaging and Stripe payment processing fees. We publish monthly reports with a breakdown.
donation.quote: "The example of those who spend their wealth in the way of Allah is like a seed which grows seven spikes; in each spike is a hundred grains."

checkout.title: Support Our Mission (Optional)
checkout.subtitle: Help us keep Ihram affordable for all
checkout.thankYou: Thank you! Your €{{amount}} donation will help support our mission.

success.title: Thank You for Your Support!
success.subtitle: Your generosity makes a difference
success.message: Your donation will help us keep Ihram affordable, support mosques, and provide assistance to those in need around the world.
success.hadith: "The best of people are those who are most beneficial to people."
success.impact: May Allah accept your sadaqah and multiply your reward.

whatNext.title: What happens next?
whatNext.step1: You will receive a receipt via email from Stripe.
whatNext.step2: Your donation will be included in our monthly transparency report.
whatNext.step3: We will use your contribution according to our mission priorities.

donationCancel.title: Donation Cancelled
donationCancel.subtitle: No worries — your card was not charged.
donationCancel.message: If you changed your mind, that's completely okay. Donations are voluntary and there is no pressure to contribute.
donationCancel.noCharge: Your payment method was not charged. You can try again anytime.

needHelp.title: Need help?

amanah.title: Our Commitment to Amanah
amanah.text: This is people's money (Amanah). We are answerable to Allah for every cent. We strive to be transparent, responsible, and accountable in all that we do.
amanah.quote: "Indeed, Allah commands you to render trusts to whom they are due." — Qur'an 4:58

hero.title: Returns & Exchanges
hero.subtitle: Clear, fair, and transparent—so you can shop with confidence.

withdrawal.title: 14-Day Right of Withdrawal
withdrawal.description: You have 14 days from delivery to return for any reason.

shipping.title: Customer Pays Return Shipping
shipping.description: For change-of-mind returns, the customer covers return postage.

exchanges.title: Easy Size Exchanges
exchanges.description: Need a different size? We make swaps simple, subject to stock.

defective.title: We Cover Defective/Wrong Items
defective.description: If we made a mistake or the item is defective, we pay return shipping.

step1.title: Email Us
step1.description: Contact support@pureihraam.com with your order number to start the process.

step2.title: Pack the Item
step2.description: Ensure the item is unused, unwashed, and in its original packaging with tags where applicable.

step3.title: Ship to Our Address
step3.description: Send the package to our return address using a tracked shipping method.

step4.title: Refund After Inspection
step4.description: Once we receive and inspect the item, your refund is processed within 14 days.

address.label: Return Address
address.trackNote: Please use a tracked shipping method and keep your receipt.

exchanges.title: Exchanges
exchanges.point1: We accept size exchanges, subject to stock availability.
exchanges.point2: Customer pays: return shipping to us + shipping for the replacement item.
exchanges.point3: Contact us with your order number and desired size to get started.

refunds.title: Refunds
refunds.method: Refunds are issued to your original payment method.
refunds.timeline: We process refunds within 14 days after receiving your return notice. We may wait until the item is received or proof of shipment is provided.
refunds.shippingRefund: Standard outbound shipping is refunded. Express shipping upgrades beyond standard rate are not refunded.

conditions.title: Condition, Hygiene & Fairness
conditions.inspect: You may inspect the item as you would in a store — try it on to check fit and quality.
conditions.valueReduction: If the item has been used more than necessary for inspection, a value reduction may apply.
conditions.unused: Returns must be unused, unwashed, free of odors and stains, and in original condition.

defective.title: Wrong Item, Damaged, or Defective?
defective.photos: Please send photos of the issue along with your order number to support@pureihraam.com.
defective.weCover: We cover return shipping costs for defective, damaged, or incorrectly shipped items.

triedOn.question: Can I return if I tried it on?
triedOn.answer: Yes. You can inspect the item as you would in a store. As long as it's unused, unwashed, and in original condition, you can return it within 14 days.

whoPays.question: Who pays for return shipping?
whoPays.answer: For change-of-mind returns, the customer pays return shipping. If the item is defective or we sent the wrong item, we cover return shipping.

refundTime.question: How long does a refund take?
refundTime.answer: We process refunds within 14 days after receiving your return notice. We may wait until the item arrives or proof of shipment is provided.

sizeExchange.question: Can I exchange for a different size?
sizeExchange.answer: Yes! Contact us with your order number and desired size. Exchanges are subject to stock availability. You pay return shipping and shipping for the replacement.

originalShipping.question: Do you refund original shipping?
originalShipping.answer: Yes, standard outbound delivery cost is refunded. If you chose an express upgrade, only the standard shipping portion is refunded.

damaged.question: What if my order arrives damaged?
damaged.answer: Contact us immediately with photos and your order number. We'll cover return shipping and send a replacement or issue a full refund.

contact.title: Need Help?
contact.orderReminder: Please include your order number in all correspondence.

dialog.title: Return / Exchange Request
dialog.subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll guide you through the process.
dialog.name: Full Name
dialog.successMessage: Thank you! Please email your request details to support@pureihraam.com with your order number. We'll respond within 24–48 hours with next steps.
